goal: Prepare the exported internal AI workspace to use global harness, project AM harness, and am-bridge staged tools.

successCriteria: A global harness command or equivalent prompt exists.
The command inspects workspace harness files.
The command reports workflow and tool readiness.
The PM/PL role split is preserved.
The model knows to use review.json as the correction layer.
The AM page modernization workflow is reusable.
Stage 1 produces a detailed integrated legacy analysis report.
Stage 2 produces a Vue page config JSON.
The runner can resolve the page path.
Artifact paths are returned in the tool output.

preferredChecks: runner help or tool callable check
stage1 on the bundled sample page or another configured known page
stage2 on a known page only when stage1 succeeded
